nasb.text: From the mouth of infants and nursing babes You have established strength Because of Your adversaries, To make the enemy and the revengeful cease.

esv.text: Out of the mouth of babies and infants, you have established strength because of your foes, to still the enemy and the avenger.

cnv.text: 因你仇敵的緣故， 你從小孩和嬰兒的口中， 得著了讚美， 使仇敵和報仇的無話可說。

ccb.text: 你使孩童和婴儿的口发出颂赞， 好叫你的仇敌哑口无言。

csbs.text: 你因敌人的缘故， 从幼童和婴儿的口中，建立了能力， 使仇敌和报复者哑口无言。
